basic_details.job_title: Oil India Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 49 Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Oil India Limited (OIL), a Maharatna PSU under Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, Government of India
basic_details.post_name: Junior Technician (Electronics Mechanic, Fitter, Instrument Mechanic, Surveyor), Junior Office Assistant, Junior Engineer (Electrical)
basic_details.department: Oil India Limited - Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam
basic_details.job_location: Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam (working in shifts in production & exploration areas of Assam & Arunachal Pradesh)
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Limited Recruitment 2026: Get the latest OIL recruitment notification 2026 for 49 vacancies under Special Recruitment Drive for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) including Junior Technician, Junior Office Assistant, and Junior Engineer posts at Oil India Limited, a Maharatna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, Government of India. The online application process starts on 8th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 8th June 2026. Find Oil India Limited PwBD vacancies at Field Headquarters, Duliajan, Assam on the official website ww

application_fee.details: All PwBD candidates are exempted from payment of application fee for this special recruitment drive.

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026. PwBD candidates get 10 years relaxation over and above the category-wise relaxation as applicable. Additional relaxations are available for Ex-Servicemen (PwBD), OIL employees, Work Contract Labourers, and Apprentices as per company rules. | Note: Additional age relaxations as applicable for Ex-Servicemen (PwBD), OIL employees, Work Contract Labourers of OIL, and Trade/Diploma Apprentices of OIL as per company rules. Maximum age under any circumstance is subject to specific relaxations mentioned in the notification.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026. Only candidates possessing the exact prescribed qualifications should apply. This recruitment drive is exclusively for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) from Assam and Arunachal Pradesh only. Candidates must possess minimum 40% benchmark disability certificate issued by competent authority. | Post-Wise Educational Qualification | Additional Requirements: | Valid Disability Certificate showing minimum 40% or more benchmark disability issued by competent authority Employment Exchange Registration Card from Assam or Arunachal Pradesh (mandatory for PwBD candidates from these states) Trade/Diploma Apprentices of OIL who have completed training successfully will get additional age relaxation and preference as per rules

vacancy_details.PwBD Category: Category b (Deaf and Hard of Hearing)
Category c (Locomotor disability including cerebral palsy, leprosy cured, dwarfism, acid attack victims and muscular dystrophy)
Category d&e (Autism, intellectual disability, specific learning disability and mental illness, Multiple disabilities)

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will be appointed on regular basis with pay scale as per the grade of the post. The posts involve working in shifts in arduous and hazardous conditions in remote/far-flung OIL installations across production and exploration areas of Assam and Arunachal Pradesh.

selection_process: A General English & GK/Awareness + Questions on OIL 20
C Domain/Technical Knowledge (related to respective post/trade) 60
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Oil India Limited official website (www.oil-india.com) under "Career at OIL" section. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 08-05-2026 (14:00 Hrs) to 08-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs). Candidates can apply for only one post.
Step 1: Visit Official Website - Go to www.oil-india.com → Career at OIL → Current Openings
Step 2: Register - Click on the relevant advertisement link and register with required details
important_instructions: This Special Recruitment Drive is exclusively for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) from Assam and Arunachal Pradesh only Candidates must possess minimum 40% or more benchmark disability certificate issued by competent authority Candidates can apply for only one post. Multiple applications will be rejected All eligibility criteria including age, qualification, disability percentage etc. will be calculated as on the crucial date i.e. 08-06-2026 Employment Exchange Registration Card from Assam or Arunachal Pradesh is mandatory The posts involve working in shifts in arduous and hazardous conditions in remote/far-flung OIL installations across production and exploration areas of Assam and Arunachal Pradesh Scribe facility is available for eligible PwBD candidates as per RPwD Act, 2016 guidelines Compensatory time of 40 minutes will be provided to PwBD candidates in CBT (Total duration: 2 Hours 40 Minutes) There is no negative marking in the Computer Based Test Qualifying marks for CBT is 40 out of 100 Travel fare reimbursement (2nd class Rail/Bus fare) will be provided for appearing in CBT There is no interview. Selection is based on CBT performance and Document Verification only Trade/Diploma Apprentices of OIL who have completed training successfully will get additional age relaxation and preference as per rules All communications regarding admit card, result, and other notifications will be sent via email/SMS only. Candidates must provide valid email ID and mobile number Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification The number of vacancies is tentative and subject to change The decision of OIL Management will be final and binding on all matters related to this recruitment Any dispute will be subject to the jurisdiction of Dibrugarh District Court only Candidates are advised to visit the official website www.oil-india.com regularly for all updates regarding CBT date, admit card, results, and other important notifications
